title: get_list_converter with custom delimiter strips wrong quotes
body:
When get_list_converter() is used with a non-comma delimiter such as "|", the bracket-stripping logic still checks for "[" and "]" which is correct, but the quote stripping iterates over items split by the custom delimiter and still strips single/double quotes from items that contain them legitimately.



Fix: only strip symmetric quote pairs (first char == last char AND both are quotes).
Add a test in radicli/tests/test_util.py with a pipe-delimited converter and quoted content.
